variants.title: HiFi Filter SACR 01007 Latch
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SACR 01007 Latch. Easy to install and replace, the SACR 01007 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: LATCH, Dimension 1 (D1): 142.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 30.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 19.5 mm, Height 1 (H1): 98.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 16.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 6.5 mm
